query:

  ADD COLUMN funcao VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL AFTER cargo,
  ADD COLUMN salario_base DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT NULL AFTER salarioMaximo,
  ADD COLUMN comissionado TINYINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL AFTER salario_base,
  ADD COLUMN cargo_confianca TINYINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL AFTER comissionado,
  ADD COLUMN requisitos_formacao TEXT DEFAULT NULL AFTER cargo_confianca;
